/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/untitled_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/slidingmenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/usermenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/bottomsheet.cpp.o -o untitled  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.8 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.8
